title: ophrys × benacensis
intro: Ophrys × benacensis, also known as the bee orchid, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys bombyliflora. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the uterus and alleviate menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Ophrys × benacensis include its potential to treat various gynecological issues, such as irregular periods and menopausal symptoms. Ophrys × benacensis can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of a tincture, infusion, or decoction, which are often used to treat female reproductive health issues.
